name: Mayura Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Dining, Travel, Online, International, Birthday, and incremental spends above ₹20,000
Rent, education, wallet load, and government spends
Utility, insurance, FASTag, and railway spends

domestic: 4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter (including 1 guest visit), subject to a minimum spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.
international: 4 complimentary international airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to a minimum spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.

milestones.label: 7,500 Reward Points on annual spending of ₹8 Lakh
15,000 Reward Points on annual spending of ₹15 Lakh

milestoneBenefits: Earn 7,500 Reward Points on annual spending of ₹8 Lakh
Earn 15,000 Reward Points on annual spending of ₹15 Lakh
additionalBenefits: Premium metal credit card with peacock design
Welcome benefit of up to 12,000 Reward Points upon fee realization and meeting spend milestones
4 complimentary railway lounge visits per quarter
Complimentary golf privileges (up to 40 rounds/lessons per year)
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie ticket offer up to ₹500 twice a month via District app
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹300 per statement cycle at HPCL stations
Reward points are valid for 24 months
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
5X reward points (3.33 points per ₹100 spent) up to ₹20,000 per statement cycle.
10X reward points (6.67 points per ₹100 spent) on incremental spends above ₹20,000 and birthday spends.
3X reward points (2.0 points per ₹100 spent) on rent, education, wallet load, and government spends.
1X reward points (0.67 points per ₹100 spent) on utilities, insurance, railways, and FASTag recharges.
Airport lounge access requires a minimum spend of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.
Buy 1 Get 1 movie ticket offer is subject to a spend threshold of ₹20,000 in the previous calendar month.
